chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-6293 / 2019 Along with C. P. No. D-6294, 6416 & 6417 / 2019 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ PRIORITY 1) For orders on CMA No. 4169/2020. 2) For hearing of CMA No. 27958/2019. 3) For hearing of main case. 20.11.2025. Mr. Jam Zeeshan, Advocate for Petitioner. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. Saadat Yar Khan, Advocate for Respondent No. 2. Ms. Masooda Siraj, Advocate for Respondent. Ms. Nazia Hinjarah, Advocate for Respondent-KPT. ___________________ Learned counsel for petitioner states that the subject matter of the petition is no longer a live issue and he withdraws the petition with the caveat that in the event the same re-surfaces again, the petitioner would be at liberty to file a fresh petition. Order accordingly. Petition disposed of along with listed applications. Office to place copy of this order in connected petitions. J U D G E J U D G E Arshad/
